2026-04-20T01:21:36.2251203Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2251788Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2252236Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2252609Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2252923Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2253160Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2253316Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2253493Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2253669Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2253890Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2254090Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2254373Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-20T01:21:36.2254627Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
